text:
On Sat, Nov 28, 2009 at 10:05:17PM -0200, Sylvio Cesar Teixeira wrote:
> Why was "|| defined(ENABLE_DEFAULT_COLORS)" removed?
Because it's non-standart knob. User settable knobs must begin with
WITH_|WITHOUT_ See discussion in
http://groups.google.com/group/lucky.freebsd.cvs.ports.digest/browse_thread/thread/c105124f263b6557/2b646931f37387a5


--
Adios
